title: We Are Justice! The Dragon Keepers!
overview: Tired of the Sunday Showdown charade, Fighter D decides to defeat the Rangers for real this time.

title: Go! Fighter D!
overview: Fighter D reunites with Yumeko Suzukiri, who approaches him with an unexpected proposal.

title: Our Evil Will Bloom, Someday.
overview: Fighter D decides to infiltrate the Red Garrison with Yumeko, only to find himself in a tight spot.

title: The Soldier with Love, Hibiki!
overview: In pursuit of Fighter D, Aran Hekiru, a Blue Junior Third Rank, discovers his connection to Hibiki.

title: Fighter D, as a Part of “Ranger Force”
overview: Fighter D infiltrates the White Dragon's Nest in disguise and discovers someone in hiding.

title: 1 Plus 2 Equals... Threat!
overview: Fighter D and Kai Shion work together to face off against Shun Tokita in the final exam.

title: The Zigzag Road to the Final Exam!
overview: Fighter D's plans go awry as Shion works with the other cadets on the second day of the exam.

title: Shout Out Loud, Cadets!
overview: Peltrola sneaks into the White Dragon's Nest, and meets Komachi Aizome of the Blue Squadron.

title: Battle! Fever! Fighter D!
overview: Fighter XX steps in to help Fighter D but is stopped by Blue Keeper with his Divine Artifact.

title: It's Showtime for Blue Keeper!
overview: Peltrola retreats after an all-out fight with Blue Keeper, but is halted by the Junior First Ranks.

title: On the Road to My Justice!
overview: The cadets, Junior First Ranks, and Blue Keeper team up against Peltrola and their clones.

title: Never Stop, Fighter D!
overview: Fighter D engages in a head-to-head fight with Blue Keeper despite his overwhelming disadvantage.

title: Look! The Dragon Keepers!
overview: Fighter D encounters Chidori, a peculiar man investigating a string of mysterious disappearances.

title: For This School, in This Moment
overview: Fighter D and his squadmates encounter an enigmatic organization and are trapped in an illusion.

title: Lost Memories
overview: Fighter D and Hisui prepare for combat as the Green Squadron reunites with someone unexpected.

title: Make Our Dreams Come True, Ranger Force
overview: Fighter D turns the tide of the battle searching for a way back into the illusory school.

title: The Arrival of Green ~The Maji Tsuyo Force~
overview: Fighter D continues his search for the boss monster Magatia with Hisui and Nishiki, a detective.

title: Lost in Confusion...Seriously
overview: Fighter D begins executing his plan to take down the Green Keeper with Suzukiri's help.

title: We Are the Monster Protection Society
overview: While the Ranger Force's deception is revealed, a new organization begins to lurk behind the scenes.

title: Come and Join the Monsters!
overview: Fighter D and Hisui confront Yakushi Usukubo, the Head Director of the Monster Protection Society.

title: Here Comes Fighter D!
overview: Fighter D learns the shocking truth behind the Divine Artifacts, Dragon Keepers, and monsters.

title: A Special Bond ~Hibiki and Sesera~
overview: The thread of fate connecting Hibiki and Sesera begins unraveling towards an unexpected outcome.

title: The Dragon Keepers vs. Deathmecia
overview: As the world is under attack by the Monster Army, Fighter D renews his resolve once again.

title: The One and Only Fighter D
overview: Fighter D decides to cooperate with the Ranger Force temporarily to corner Deathmecia.
